title: Phase 1 - Foundation Setup
description: Project foundation setup including Next.js 14+, Tailwind CSS 3.x, TypeScript configuration and initial structure.

title: Create Footer Component
description: Build Footer.tsx with professional credentials, contact information, social links, VAT number and registration info.

title: bug
description: The text on primary buttons (Scrivimi, Contattami, Spreaker) and footer elements has low contrast against the background, making it hard to read. The issue affects: 1) Primary buttons with dark background showing dark text instead of white 2) Footer text showing dark gray on dark background. Root cause appears to be global anchor styles overriding button text colors.

title: Content Migration
description: Migrate all content from existing WordPress site including text, images, and configuration.

title: Assemble Homepage
description: Integrate all homepage sections in app/page.tsx: Hero, WhyPsychologist, PracticalInfo, Journey, InterventionAreas, Contact with proper spacing.

title: Accessibility Audit
description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit: keyboard navigation, screen reader testing, color contrast verification, skip-to-content link.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Optimize Core Web Vitals: next/image with WebP/AVIF, font preloading, lazy loading, minimize JS bundle.

title: Integrate Analytics
description: Set up Vercel Analytics or Plausible for privacy-focused website analytics.

title: Create Project Directory Structure
description: Set up directory structure: app/ components/ (layout, sections, ui, shared), lib/ (constants, types, utils), public/images/, content/

title: Integrate Email Service Resend
description: Set up Resend for sending contact form submissions to stefano.icardi@outlook.com with email templates.
close_reason: Email service implemented with Resend integration. Includes lazy initialization, beautiful email templates, rate limiting, and graceful fallback.

title: Post-Launch Monitoring
description: Set up monitoring: error tracking with Sentry (optional), uptime monitoring, performance monitoring.

title: Create Contact Section Component
description: Build Contact.tsx section with contact form, contact information display, social links, and Google Maps integration.
close_reason: Contact section implemented with form, contact info, social links, WhatsApp button, and Google Maps integration.

title: DNS Migration and Deployment
description: Deploy to Vercel production: configure custom domain stefanoicardi.com, set up DNS records, SSL certificate verification.

title: Optimize Media Assets for Next.js
description: Optimize existing downloaded images for Next.js: convert to WebP/AVIF format, configure next/image appropriately.

title: Create InterventionAreas Section Component
description: Build InterventionAreas.tsx with service list and icons for anxiety, depression, relationships, and other intervention areas.

title: Create 404 Not Found Page
description: Build app/not-found.tsx with friendly error message, navigation options to return home, and consistent branding.

title: Create Hero Section Component
description: Build Hero.tsx section with two-column layout, profile image, main H1 heading, intro text, CTAs, trust badges, and entrance animations.

title: Create PracticalInfo Section Component
description: Build PracticalInfo.tsx with 3-column responsive grid, icons for clock/calendar/location, hover effects, and session info.
close_reason: PracticalInfo section implemented with 3-column grid, icons, descriptions, hover effects.

title: Create SocialLinks Component
description: Build SocialLinks.tsx UI component displaying Instagram and LinkedIn links with icons.

title: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript
description: Set up Next.js 14+ project with App Router and TypeScript support using npx create-next-app@latest.

title: Create GoogleMap Component
description: Build GoogleMap.tsx shared component for embedding interactive Google Maps with office location at Viale Luigi Majno 38, Milano.

title: Add Structured Data JSON-LD
description: Implement JSON-LD structured data: LocalBusiness/PsychologicalTreatment schema, Person schema, address, contact, social profiles.

title: Create Articoli Podcast Page
description: Build /articoli page with Spreaker podcast embed, custom styled wrapper, episode descriptions, subscribe buttons for Spotify and Apple Podcasts.

title: Phase 3 - Inner Pages
description: Implementation of Chi Sono (About), Articoli (Podcast/Blog), and 404 pages.

title: Implement SEO Metadata
description: Add per-page SEO metadata: custom title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph images, locale settings (it_IT).
close_reason: SEO metadata implemented: global metadata in layout.tsx with title template, OG/Twitter cards, keywords, robots config. Per-page metadata in chi-sono and articoli pages. JSON-LD structured data in SEO.tsx component.

title: Populate Content from Audit
description: Populate all page content from old-stefanoicardi-website-audit.md: hero text, why section, practical info, journey, intervention areas, Chi Sono content.
close_reason: Content populated from audit: WhyPsychologist, Journey, InterventionAreas sections updated with authentic content. Hero updated with profile image and professional info. Articoli page implemented with Spreaker podcast embed.

title: Phase 2 - Homepage Implementation
description: Complete homepage implementation with all sections as per the current stefanoicardi.com website including Hero, WhyPsychologist, PracticalInfo, Journey, InterventionAreas, and Contact sections.

title: Create Chi Sono Page
description: Build /chi-sono page with hero image, title overlay, Formazione section, Attivita section, CV download link, and proper SEO metadata.
close_reason: Chi Sono page fully implemented with hero image, profile section, formazione, attivita, and studio sections with SEO metadata.

title: Create ContactForm Component
description: Build ContactForm.tsx with React Hook Form, Zod validation, fields: nome, email, telefono (optional), messaggio. Include loading, success, error states.
close_reason: ContactForm implemented with all fields (nome, email, telefono, messaggio), loading states, success/error handling, and API integration.

title: Create SectionHeading Component
description: Build SectionHeading.tsx with title, subtitle, alignment options, and semantic heading level (h1/h2/h3).

title: Configure URL Redirects
description: Set up redirects in next.config.js: /chisono to /chi-sono (301), /blog to /articoli (301).

title: Create Contact Form API Route
description: Build app/api/contact/route.ts with POST endpoint, input validation, sanitization, and rate limiting (5 requests per IP per hour).

title: Create WhyPsychologist Section Component
description: Build WhyPsychologist.tsx section explaining why to see a psychologist with image + text layout and nature imagery.

title: Create Button Component
description: Build Button.tsx with variants: primary, secondary, outline, ghost. Sizes: sm, md, lg. Support for href (link) and onClick (button).

title: Create Constants from Audit
description: Create lib/constants.ts with data from old-stefanoicardi-website-audit.md: contact info, address, coordinates, social links, professional registration.
close_reason: Constants file created with siteConfig, contactInfo (address, coordinates, social links, professional registration), and navigation structure.

title: Phase 4 - Polish and Integration
description: API routes, email integration, SEO, analytics, and GDPR compliance implementation.

title: Create MobileNav Component
description: Build MobileNav.tsx with slide-out/overlay navigation, keyboard navigation support, and ARIA labels for accessibility.

title: Create Journey Section Component
description: Build Journey.tsx full-width text section describing the psychological journey (Il percorso psicologico).
close_reason: Journey section implemented with two-column layout, authentic content about the therapeutic process, and decorative image.

title: Create Cookie Consent Banner
description: Implement GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with accept/reject options, preference persistence, and analytics integration.

title: Cross-Browser Testing
description: Test website across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge. Document and fix any compatibility issues.

title: Mobile Responsiveness QA
description: Test responsive design on various mobile screen sizes, tablets, and desktop viewports. Fix any layout issues.

title: Configure Tailwind CSS Design System
description: Configure Tailwind CSS 3.x with custom color palette, typography (Playfair Display + Inter), spacing, and container settings.

title: Create Header Component
description: Build Header.tsx with sticky behavior, logo/brand section, navigation links, and mobile hamburger menu trigger.

title: Phase 5 - Testing and Launch
description: Quality assurance, performance optimization, and production deployment.
